title: salix anglorum f. caespitosa
intro: Salix anglorum f. caespitosa, also known as the English willow or dwarf willow, is a shrubby or small tree species of the willow family (Salicaceae). This plant is rich in medicinal properties, including salicylic acid, which is responsible for its anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects. The health benefits of Salix anglorum f. caespitosa include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism and arthritis symptoms, and acting as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant include making a tea from its leaves and branches, or using it in the form of salves, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
